description: Curated learning resources mapped to competencies. Used by Growth Compass to recommend concrete next actions.

resources.title: Designing Data-Intensive Applications
resources.author: Martin Kleppmann
resources.why_recommended: The foundational reference for distributed systems thinking. Chapters 5-9 are especially relevant to replication, partitioning, and consensus.

resources.title: System Design Interview — An Insider's Guide
resources.author: Alex Xu
resources.why_recommended: Practical framework for thinking through design problems. Good for building the muscle of structured design reasoning.

resources.title: Anthropic Prompt Engineering Guide
resources.why_recommended: The best starting point for structured prompt engineering. Covers system prompts, multi-turn, and tool use.

resources.title: Model Context Protocol (MCP) Specification
resources.why_recommended: The protocol for connecting AI agents to external systems. Essential for building agents that interact with real business tools.

resources.title: The Making of a Manager
resources.author: Julie Zhuo
resources.why_recommended: Practical, humble guide to people management. Excellent for engineers transitioning to leadership.

resources.title: The Coaching Habit
resources.author: Michael Bungay Stanier
resources.why_recommended: Seven essential coaching questions. Short, immediately applicable framework for developing others.

resources.title: Writing Engineering Strategy Docs
resources.author: Will Larson
resources.why_recommended: Practical template for communicating technical direction. Bridges the gap between design docs and vision.

resources.title: How to Measure Anything
resources.author: Douglas W. Hubbard
resources.why_recommended: The bible of quantifying the seemingly unquantifiable. Directly relevant to 'datafying the un-datafied.'

resources.title: Thinking in Bets
resources.author: Annie Duke
resources.why_recommended: Decision-making under uncertainty through a poker lens. Separates decision quality from outcome quality.

resources.title: Are Your Lights On?
resources.author: Gerald Weinberg
resources.why_recommended: Classic on problem definition. Teaches you to ask 'what is the problem really?' before solving anything.

resources.title: Shape Up: Stop Running in Circles
resources.author: Ryan Singer / Basecamp
resources.why_recommended: Practical methodology for shipping in fixed time with variable scope. Good for building the '2-3 week MVP' muscle.

resources.title: Building AI-Native Products
resources.author: Various
resources.why_recommended: Thinking patterns for AI-native design. How to redesign processes around AI capabilities rather than adding AI on top.

resources.title: Building a Working AI Agent in 2 Weeks
resources.why_recommended: A structured sprint template: Week 1 = core agent + knowledge base, Week 2 = skills + MCP + polish. Use this to build your portfolio.

resources.title: The Mom Test
resources.author: Rob Fitzpatrick
resources.why_recommended: How to talk to users and learn when your idea is bad. Essential for anyone building products for people other than themselves.
